title: tilia × orbicularis
intro: Tilia × orbicularis, also known as the Littleleaf Linden or Tolerant Linden, is a hybrid plant species within the Tilia genus, characterized by its compact growth habit and small leaves. The medicinal properties of Tilia × orbicularis lie in its ability to act as a mild sedative, reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tilia × orbicularis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and overall well-being.
